jobs.title: Road Sweeper / Refuse Loaders / Litterpickers
jobs.description:
Road Sweepers and Refuse Loaders

Elite CLS LTD is a recruitment agency.

We have recently been approved to supply temporary staff to Enfield Council.

Main Duties Road Sweeper:

Sweeping Pavements, Channels, and Backlines, Litter picking and weeding, Salt Spreading.
Driving licence preferred.
Main Duties Refuse Loader:

Assisting Crews to Collect Wheelie Bins. 
Collecting Refuse and Recycling Sacks.

Job Details:

Early Morning Starts will be part of the Rota Ongoing work for the right candidates.
Weekly Paid one week in arrears.
2 Years Referencing is essential.

Job ID: 224928527

Job Reference: SDGG21B
